records.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Sigh.* Bollocks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Sigh.* Bollocks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Sigh.* Bollocks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Roy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Roy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Roy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing here? Aren't you supposed to be home?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing here? Aren't you supposed to be home?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing here? Aren't you supposed to be home?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Gramps, it's you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Gramps, it's you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Gramps, it's you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You could've told me if you were here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You could've told me if you were here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You could've told me if you were here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you're empty-handed again? Guess the fishing was a bust then, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, you're empty-handed again? Guess the fishing was a bust then, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, you're empty-handed again? Guess the fishing was a bust then, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk. You and your filthy mouth... You're supposed to fish until you catch something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk. You and your filthy mouth... You're supposed to fish until you catch something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk. You and your filthy mouth... You're supposed to fish until you catch something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No need to be disappointed for not catching anything today. Believing that you can catch one the next day is what's important.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No need to be disappointed for not catching anything today. Believing that you can catch one the next day is what's important.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No need to be disappointed for not catching anything today. Believing that you can catch one the next day is what's important.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You always say that, but you never even caught one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You always say that, but you never even caught one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You always say that, but you never even caught one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When can I try your special <color=#ffd34c>fish and chips</color> you always talk about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: When can I try your special <color=#ffd34c>fish and chips</color> you always talk about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: When can I try your special <color=#ffd34c>fish and chips</color> you always talk about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah. Why, would you like me to catch a bass from a nearby sewers?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah. Why, would you like me to catch a bass from a nearby sewers?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah. Why, would you like me to catch a bass from a nearby sewers?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, forget it! You can keep it all to yourself!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, forget it! You can keep it all to yourself!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, forget it! You can keep it all to yourself!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what's happened to your face? Are you being bullied?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what's happened to your face? Are you being bullied?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what's happened to your face? Are you being bullied?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not really. It's none of your concern.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not really. It's none of your concern.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not really. It's none of your concern.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was it Robert?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was it Robert?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was it Robert?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah! I tackled him, so what?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah! I tackled him, so what?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah! I tackled him, so what?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That bastard keeps drinking and trying to hit Mum! You happy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That bastard keeps drinking and trying to hit Mum! You happy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That bastard keeps drinking and trying to hit Mum! You happy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey. If you're going to apologize, keep it to yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey. If you're going to apologize, keep it to yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey. If you're going to apologize, keep it to yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know it's not your fault anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know it's not your fault anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know it's not your fault anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This bloody family would've starved to death if it weren't for the money you sent us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This bloody family would've starved to death if it weren't for the money you sent us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This bloody family would've starved to death if it weren't for the money you sent us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, don't act like you care about us after everything. Just go fishing with your friends or something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, don't act like you care about us after everything. Just go fishing with your friends or something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, don't act like you care about us after everything. Just go fishing with your friends or something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take care of it. Whether I knock down Dad or I separate Mum from him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take care of it. Whether I knock down Dad or I separate Mum from him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take care of it. Whether I knock down Dad or I separate Mum from him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can say it was for a noble cause, but it's still true that I wasn't able to take care of your family.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can say it was for a noble cause, but it's still true that I wasn't able to take care of your family.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can say it was for a noble cause, but it's still true that I wasn't able to take care of your family.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And... it would be impossible to fill that deep of an emotional void now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And... it would be impossible to fill that deep of an emotional void now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And... it would be impossible to fill that deep of an emotional void now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Noble cause"? Are you kidding me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Noble cause"? Are you kidding me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Noble cause"? Are you kidding me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Roy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Roy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Roy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is not enough of a reason for us Burnetts to stop the cycle of duties we bear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is not enough of a reason for us Burnetts to stop the cycle of duties we bear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is not enough of a reason for us Burnetts to stop the cycle of duties we bear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is this chain?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is this chain?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is this chain?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You want me to fight my deadbeat dad with this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You want me to fight my deadbeat dad with this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You want me to fight my deadbeat dad with this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop the nonsense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop the nonsense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop the nonsense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If he remembers what this chain means, he won't hit you ever again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If he remembers what this chain means, he won't hit you ever again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If he remembers what this chain means, he won't hit you ever again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rather, he'll likely cower and grovel in your presence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rather, he'll likely cower and grovel in your presence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rather, he'll likely cower and grovel in your presence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because that's something of a symbol of our fallen house.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because that's something of a symbol of our fallen house.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because that's something of a symbol of our fallen house.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A symbol of our house?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A symbol of our house?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A symbol of our house?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What he said was true.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What he said was true.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What he said was true.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From that day on, Dad never laid a hand on me or Mum again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From that day on, Dad never laid a hand on me or Mum again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From that day on, Dad never laid a hand on me or Mum again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And not too long after that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And not too long after that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And not too long after that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard about my grandfather's passing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard about my grandfather's passing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard about my grandfather's passing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I assumed so when I saw you with the Sealing Chain,
records.m_Talk_DEU: I assumed so when I saw you with the Sealing Chain,
records.m_Talk_FRA: I assumed so when I saw you with the Sealing Chain,

records.m_Talk_ENG: but it seems like your grandfather had planned to hand over Prydwen to you since then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: but it seems like your grandfather had planned to hand over Prydwen to you since then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: but it seems like your grandfather had planned to hand over Prydwen to you since then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In order to handle the shield, you first need to get used to the chain, which is the by-product of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In order to handle the shield, you first need to get used to the chain, which is the by-product of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In order to handle the shield, you first need to get used to the chain, which is the by-product of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk. So that's what he meant by "symbol of our house."
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk. So that's what he meant by "symbol of our house."
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk. So that's what he meant by "symbol of our house."

records.m_Talk_ENG: So what's with my deadbeat dad?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So what's with my deadbeat dad?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So what's with my deadbeat dad?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did he do that made Tea Bomb say that he abandoned his responsibilities and ran away?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did he do that made Tea Bomb say that he abandoned his responsibilities and ran away?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did he do that made Tea Bomb say that he abandoned his responsibilities and ran away?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm, perhaps what happened with Robert was...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm, perhaps what happened with Robert was...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm, perhaps what happened with Robert was...

records.m_Talk_ENG: a result of the high status your grandfather holds within the Institution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: a result of the high status your grandfather holds within the Institution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: a result of the high status your grandfather holds within the Institution.

records.m_Talk_ENG: See, it was the previous chief's, Lady Elizabeth's father's, time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: See, it was the previous chief's, Lady Elizabeth's father's, time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: See, it was the previous chief's, Lady Elizabeth's father's, time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I think back on it, it was when the Institution held the most power. Sir Burnett was still working, even though he was close to retirement.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I think back on it, it was when the Institution held the most power. Sir Burnett was still working, even though he was close to retirement.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I think back on it, it was when the Institution held the most power. Sir Burnett was still working, even though he was close to retirement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And he had a son.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And he had a son.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And he had a son.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As the son of the legendary Burnett, everyone treated him like the Institution's next up-and-comer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As the son of the legendary Burnett, everyone treated him like the Institution's next up-and-comer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As the son of the legendary Burnett, everyone treated him like the Institution's next up-and-comer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Robert was well aware of his position. He might have had pride in it, too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Robert was well aware of his position. He might have had pride in it, too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Robert was well aware of his position. He might have had pride in it, too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, he also had an extreme side.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, he also had an extreme side.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, he also had an extreme side.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As soon as Robert inherited Prydwen, he came up with a plan to eradicate the Society in one go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As soon as Robert inherited Prydwen, he came up with a plan to eradicate the Society in one go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As soon as Robert inherited Prydwen, he came up with a plan to eradicate the Society in one go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eradicate the Society? How?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eradicate the Society? How?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eradicate the Society? How?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Through cooperating with MacCready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Through cooperating with MacCready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Through cooperating with MacCready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our plan was to figure out the time and location of the Society's regular meetings and eliminate the President and all the deans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our plan was to figure out the time and location of the Society's regular meetings and eliminate the President and all the deans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our plan was to figure out the time and location of the Society's regular meetings and eliminate the President and all the deans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, did you just say MacCready?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, did you just say MacCready?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, did you just say MacCready?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The father of the current President, Regina MacCready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The father of the current President, Regina MacCready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The father of the current President, Regina MacCready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The MacCready family was obsessed with the Lake of Knowledge, and they brought him into the MacCready family to carry on the family name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The MacCready family was obsessed with the Lake of Knowledge, and they brought him into the MacCready family to carry on the family name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The MacCready family was obsessed with the Lake of Knowledge, and they brought him into the MacCready family to carry on the family name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But he was someone arranged by the Institution from the start.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But he was someone arranged by the Institution from the start.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But he was someone arranged by the Institution from the start.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In other words... he was our most important intel agent that should never have been caught.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In other words... he was our most important intel agent that should never have been caught.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In other words... he was our most important intel agent that should never have been caught.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No way. He actually did something that risky?
records.m_Talk_DEU: No way. He actually did something that risky?
records.m_Talk_FRA: No way. He actually did something that risky?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Think about it. It was not long after the Administration Failure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Think about it. It was not long after the Administration Failure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Think about it. It was not long after the Administration Failure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a time when the masses would risk anything for peace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a time when the masses would risk anything for peace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a time when the masses would risk anything for peace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Robert received the sealing coordinates for MacCready Point from the intel agent and conducted an ambush operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Robert received the sealing coordinates for MacCready Point from the intel agent and conducted an ambush operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Robert received the sealing coordinates for MacCready Point from the intel agent and conducted an ambush operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, he was too sure of his victory despite it being his first operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, he was too sure of his victory despite it being his first operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, he was too sure of his victory despite it being his first operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Similar to how we got intel on the enemy, our information was being leaked to the enemy as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Similar to how we got intel on the enemy, our information was being leaked to the enemy as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Similar to how we got intel on the enemy, our information was being leaked to the enemy as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eventually, the ambush operation failed and the agents that were assigned to the operation were all murdered.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eventually, the ambush operation failed and the agents that were assigned to the operation were all murdered.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eventually, the ambush operation failed and the agents that were assigned to the operation were all murdered.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is assumed that our prime intel agent was purged during the process as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is assumed that our prime intel agent was purged during the process as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is assumed that our prime intel agent was purged during the process as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Institution's influence is weaker because of the aftermath of that day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Institution's influence is weaker because of the aftermath of that day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Institution's influence is weaker because of the aftermath of that day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And... I lost my one eye from that operation too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And... I lost my one eye from that operation too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And... I lost my one eye from that operation too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying that the Institution's leak...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying that the Institution's leak...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying that the Institution's leak...

records.m_Talk_ENG: was my father?
records.m_Talk_DEU: was my father?
records.m_Talk_FRA: was my father?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That operation was top secret. Even I was briefed on the day of the operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That operation was top secret. Even I was briefed on the day of the operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That operation was top secret. Even I was briefed on the day of the operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He denied it, but Robert was in charge of that operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He denied it, but Robert was in charge of that operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He denied it, but Robert was in charge of that operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The day his punishment was determined, he threw his inherited Prydwen on the ground in a fit of anger and left the Institution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The day his punishment was determined, he threw his inherited Prydwen on the ground in a fit of anger and left the Institution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The day his punishment was determined, he threw his inherited Prydwen on the ground in a fit of anger and left the Institution.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't help but get furious... when I think of that day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't help but get furious... when I think of that day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't help but get furious... when I think of that day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If his last name wasn't Burnett, I would've ended him with my own two hands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If his last name wasn't Burnett, I would've ended him with my own two hands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If his last name wasn't Burnett, I would've ended him with my own two hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, your grandfather had to postpone his retirement and work out on the field to make up for this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, your grandfather had to postpone his retirement and work out on the field to make up for this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, your grandfather had to postpone his retirement and work out on the field to make up for this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you feel relieved knowing what happened?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you feel relieved knowing what happened?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you feel relieved knowing what happened?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not at all. I'm a lot more disturbed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not at all. I'm a lot more disturbed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not at all. I'm a lot more disturbed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah hah. That's what the truth will do to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah hah. That's what the truth will do to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah hah. That's what the truth will do to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Still.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Still.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Still.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's better than not knowing anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's better than not knowing anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's better than not knowing anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks for telling me the truth, Morgan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks for telling me the truth, Morgan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks for telling me the truth, Morgan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Institution will continue to need the power of the Burnetts until our goal is achieved.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Institution will continue to need the power of the Burnetts until our goal is achieved.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Institution will continue to need the power of the Burnetts until our goal is achieved.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But your name mustn't define your whole existence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But your name mustn't define your whole existence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But your name mustn't define your whole existence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A gentleman is defined by his actions, after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A gentleman is defined by his actions, after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A gentleman is defined by his actions, after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Agent Morgan. Sorry to disturb you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Agent Morgan. Sorry to disturb you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Agent Morgan. Sorry to disturb you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The snowstorm is getting worse, so it looks like you'll have to get to the destination yourselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The snowstorm is getting worse, so it looks like you'll have to get to the destination yourselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The snowstorm is getting worse, so it looks like you'll have to get to the destination yourselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll land on a nearby landing site.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll land on a nearby landing site.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll land on a nearby landing site.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. It was starting to get a bit tedious anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. It was starting to get a bit tedious anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. It was starting to get a bit tedious anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get your protective suit. You'll lose more than just your hair if you are exposed to snow mixed with Corruption ray.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get your protective suit. You'll lose more than just your hair if you are exposed to snow mixed with Corruption ray.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get your protective suit. You'll lose more than just your hair if you are exposed to snow mixed with Corruption ray.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, right. Do you carry any cash with you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, right. Do you carry any cash with you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, right. Do you carry any cash with you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Are you trying to rob me or something? No one carries around cash these days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Are you trying to rob me or something? No one carries around cash these days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Are you trying to rob me or something? No one carries around cash these days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is embarrassing. I forgot to bring offerings to the church.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is embarrassing. I forgot to bring offerings to the church.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is embarrassing. I forgot to bring offerings to the church.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey. That's not what's important. We're not here to make a confession.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey. That's not what's important. We're not here to make a confession.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey. That's not what's important. We're not here to make a confession.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk, tsk. That's why you're still just a kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk, tsk. That's why you're still just a kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk, tsk. That's why you're still just a kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're an agent, so you should know. These kinds of occasions call for formalities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're an agent, so you should know. These kinds of occasions call for formalities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're an agent, so you should know. These kinds of occasions call for formalities.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Even if you don't mean it, it's useful to make a good impression for later on
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Even if you don't mean it, it's useful to make a good impression for later on
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Even if you don't mean it, it's useful to make a good impression for later on
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to my memory, you had mentioned how you would make a confession the next time you were to visit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to my memory, you had mentioned how you would make a confession the next time you were to visit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to my memory, you had mentioned how you would make a confession the next time you were to visit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems like that was merely part of the formalities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems like that was merely part of the formalities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems like that was merely part of the formalities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For your information, you can give offerings via wire transfers nowadays. Thaddeus Morgan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For your information, you can give offerings via wire transfers nowadays. Thaddeus Morgan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For your information, you can give offerings via wire transfers nowadays. Thaddeus Morgan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-hah hah. Is that so? I guess they've made great strides in technology.
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-hah hah. Is that so? I guess they've made great strides in technology.
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-hah hah. Is that so? I guess they've made great strides in technology.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Sigh.* Bollocks.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Sigh.* Bollocks.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Sigh.* Bollocks.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Roy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Roy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Roy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing here? Aren't you supposed to be home?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing here? Aren't you supposed to be home?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing here? Aren't you supposed to be home?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Gramps, it's you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Gramps, it's you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Gramps, it's you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You could've told me if you were here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You could've told me if you were here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You could've told me if you were here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, you're empty-handed again? Guess the fishing was a bust then, eh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, you're empty-handed again? Guess the fishing was a bust then, eh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, you're empty-handed again? Guess the fishing was a bust then, eh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk. You and your filthy mouth... You're supposed to fish until you catch something.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk. You and your filthy mouth... You're supposed to fish until you catch something.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk. You and your filthy mouth... You're supposed to fish until you catch something.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No need to be disappointed for not catching anything today. Believing that you can catch one the next day is what's important.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No need to be disappointed for not catching anything today. Believing that you can catch one the next day is what's important.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No need to be disappointed for not catching anything today. Believing that you can catch one the next day is what's important.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You always say that, but you never even caught one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You always say that, but you never even caught one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You always say that, but you never even caught one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When can I try your special <color=#ffd34c>fish and chips</color> you always talk about?
root.m_Talk_DEU: When can I try your special <color=#ffd34c>fish and chips</color> you always talk about?
root.m_Talk_FRA: When can I try your special <color=#ffd34c>fish and chips</color> you always talk about?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah. Why, would you like me to catch a bass from a nearby sewers?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah. Why, would you like me to catch a bass from a nearby sewers?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah. Why, would you like me to catch a bass from a nearby sewers?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, forget it! You can keep it all to yourself!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, forget it! You can keep it all to yourself!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, forget it! You can keep it all to yourself!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, what's happened to your face? Are you being bullied?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, what's happened to your face? Are you being bullied?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, what's happened to your face? Are you being bullied?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not really. It's none of your concern.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not really. It's none of your concern.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not really. It's none of your concern.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Was it Robert?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Was it Robert?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Was it Robert?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah! I tackled him, so what?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah! I tackled him, so what?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah! I tackled him, so what?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That bastard keeps drinking and trying to hit Mum! You happy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That bastard keeps drinking and trying to hit Mum! You happy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That bastard keeps drinking and trying to hit Mum! You happy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey. If you're going to apologize, keep it to yourself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey. If you're going to apologize, keep it to yourself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey. If you're going to apologize, keep it to yourself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know it's not your fault anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know it's not your fault anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know it's not your fault anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This bloody family would've starved to death if it weren't for the money you sent us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This bloody family would've starved to death if it weren't for the money you sent us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This bloody family would've starved to death if it weren't for the money you sent us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, don't act like you care about us after everything. Just go fishing with your friends or something.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, don't act like you care about us after everything. Just go fishing with your friends or something.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, don't act like you care about us after everything. Just go fishing with your friends or something.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take care of it. Whether I knock down Dad or I separate Mum from him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take care of it. Whether I knock down Dad or I separate Mum from him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take care of it. Whether I knock down Dad or I separate Mum from him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can say it was for a noble cause, but it's still true that I wasn't able to take care of your family.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can say it was for a noble cause, but it's still true that I wasn't able to take care of your family.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can say it was for a noble cause, but it's still true that I wasn't able to take care of your family.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And... it would be impossible to fill that deep of an emotional void now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And... it would be impossible to fill that deep of an emotional void now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And... it would be impossible to fill that deep of an emotional void now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: "Noble cause"? Are you kidding me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: "Noble cause"? Are you kidding me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: "Noble cause"? Are you kidding me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But Roy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But Roy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But Roy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is not enough of a reason for us Burnetts to stop the cycle of duties we bear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is not enough of a reason for us Burnetts to stop the cycle of duties we bear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is not enough of a reason for us Burnetts to stop the cycle of duties we bear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is this chain?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is this chain?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is this chain?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You want me to fight my deadbeat dad with this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You want me to fight my deadbeat dad with this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You want me to fight my deadbeat dad with this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop the nonsense.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop the nonsense.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop the nonsense.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If he remembers what this chain means, he won't hit you ever again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If he remembers what this chain means, he won't hit you ever again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If he remembers what this chain means, he won't hit you ever again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rather, he'll likely cower and grovel in your presence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rather, he'll likely cower and grovel in your presence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rather, he'll likely cower and grovel in your presence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because that's something of a symbol of our fallen house.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because that's something of a symbol of our fallen house.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because that's something of a symbol of our fallen house.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A symbol of our house?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A symbol of our house?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A symbol of our house?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What he said was true.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What he said was true.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What he said was true.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From that day on, Dad never laid a hand on me or Mum again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: From that day on, Dad never laid a hand on me or Mum again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: From that day on, Dad never laid a hand on me or Mum again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And not too long after that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And not too long after that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And not too long after that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard about my grandfather's passing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard about my grandfather's passing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard about my grandfather's passing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I assumed so when I saw you with the Sealing Chain,
root.m_Talk_DEU: I assumed so when I saw you with the Sealing Chain,
root.m_Talk_FRA: I assumed so when I saw you with the Sealing Chain,

root.m_Talk_ENG: but it seems like your grandfather had planned to hand over Prydwen to you since then.
root.m_Talk_DEU: but it seems like your grandfather had planned to hand over Prydwen to you since then.
root.m_Talk_FRA: but it seems like your grandfather had planned to hand over Prydwen to you since then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In order to handle the shield, you first need to get used to the chain, which is the by-product of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In order to handle the shield, you first need to get used to the chain, which is the by-product of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In order to handle the shield, you first need to get used to the chain, which is the by-product of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk. So that's what he meant by "symbol of our house."
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk. So that's what he meant by "symbol of our house."
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk. So that's what he meant by "symbol of our house."

root.m_Talk_ENG: So what's with my deadbeat dad?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So what's with my deadbeat dad?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So what's with my deadbeat dad?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What did he do that made Tea Bomb say that he abandoned his responsibilities and ran away?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What did he do that made Tea Bomb say that he abandoned his responsibilities and ran away?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What did he do that made Tea Bomb say that he abandoned his responsibilities and ran away?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm, perhaps what happened with Robert was...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm, perhaps what happened with Robert was...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm, perhaps what happened with Robert was...

root.m_Talk_ENG: a result of the high status your grandfather holds within the Institution.
root.m_Talk_DEU: a result of the high status your grandfather holds within the Institution.
root.m_Talk_FRA: a result of the high status your grandfather holds within the Institution.

root.m_Talk_ENG: See, it was the previous chief's, Lady Elizabeth's father's, time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: See, it was the previous chief's, Lady Elizabeth's father's, time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: See, it was the previous chief's, Lady Elizabeth's father's, time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When I think back on it, it was when the Institution held the most power. Sir Burnett was still working, even though he was close to retirement.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When I think back on it, it was when the Institution held the most power. Sir Burnett was still working, even though he was close to retirement.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When I think back on it, it was when the Institution held the most power. Sir Burnett was still working, even though he was close to retirement.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And he had a son.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And he had a son.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And he had a son.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As the son of the legendary Burnett, everyone treated him like the Institution's next up-and-comer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As the son of the legendary Burnett, everyone treated him like the Institution's next up-and-comer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As the son of the legendary Burnett, everyone treated him like the Institution's next up-and-comer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Robert was well aware of his position. He might have had pride in it, too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Robert was well aware of his position. He might have had pride in it, too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Robert was well aware of his position. He might have had pride in it, too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, he also had an extreme side.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, he also had an extreme side.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, he also had an extreme side.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As soon as Robert inherited Prydwen, he came up with a plan to eradicate the Society in one go.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As soon as Robert inherited Prydwen, he came up with a plan to eradicate the Society in one go.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As soon as Robert inherited Prydwen, he came up with a plan to eradicate the Society in one go.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eradicate the Society? How?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eradicate the Society? How?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eradicate the Society? How?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Through cooperating with MacCready.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Through cooperating with MacCready.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Through cooperating with MacCready.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our plan was to figure out the time and location of the Society's regular meetings and eliminate the President and all the deans.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our plan was to figure out the time and location of the Society's regular meetings and eliminate the President and all the deans.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our plan was to figure out the time and location of the Society's regular meetings and eliminate the President and all the deans.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, did you just say MacCready?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, did you just say MacCready?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, did you just say MacCready?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The father of the current President, Regina MacCready.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The father of the current President, Regina MacCready.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The father of the current President, Regina MacCready.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The MacCready family was obsessed with the Lake of Knowledge, and they brought him into the MacCready family to carry on the family name.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The MacCready family was obsessed with the Lake of Knowledge, and they brought him into the MacCready family to carry on the family name.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The MacCready family was obsessed with the Lake of Knowledge, and they brought him into the MacCready family to carry on the family name.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But he was someone arranged by the Institution from the start.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But he was someone arranged by the Institution from the start.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But he was someone arranged by the Institution from the start.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In other words... he was our most important intel agent that should never have been caught.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In other words... he was our most important intel agent that should never have been caught.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In other words... he was our most important intel agent that should never have been caught.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No way. He actually did something that risky?
root.m_Talk_DEU: No way. He actually did something that risky?
root.m_Talk_FRA: No way. He actually did something that risky?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Think about it. It was not long after the Administration Failure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Think about it. It was not long after the Administration Failure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Think about it. It was not long after the Administration Failure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was a time when the masses would risk anything for peace.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was a time when the masses would risk anything for peace.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was a time when the masses would risk anything for peace.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Robert received the sealing coordinates for MacCready Point from the intel agent and conducted an ambush operation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Robert received the sealing coordinates for MacCready Point from the intel agent and conducted an ambush operation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Robert received the sealing coordinates for MacCready Point from the intel agent and conducted an ambush operation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, he was too sure of his victory despite it being his first operation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, he was too sure of his victory despite it being his first operation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, he was too sure of his victory despite it being his first operation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Similar to how we got intel on the enemy, our information was being leaked to the enemy as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Similar to how we got intel on the enemy, our information was being leaked to the enemy as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Similar to how we got intel on the enemy, our information was being leaked to the enemy as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eventually, the ambush operation failed and the agents that were assigned to the operation were all murdered.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eventually, the ambush operation failed and the agents that were assigned to the operation were all murdered.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eventually, the ambush operation failed and the agents that were assigned to the operation were all murdered.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is assumed that our prime intel agent was purged during the process as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is assumed that our prime intel agent was purged during the process as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is assumed that our prime intel agent was purged during the process as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Institution's influence is weaker because of the aftermath of that day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Institution's influence is weaker because of the aftermath of that day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Institution's influence is weaker because of the aftermath of that day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And... I lost my one eye from that operation too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And... I lost my one eye from that operation too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And... I lost my one eye from that operation too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying that the Institution's leak...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying that the Institution's leak...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying that the Institution's leak...

root.m_Talk_ENG: was my father?
root.m_Talk_DEU: was my father?
root.m_Talk_FRA: was my father?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That operation was top secret. Even I was briefed on the day of the operation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That operation was top secret. Even I was briefed on the day of the operation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That operation was top secret. Even I was briefed on the day of the operation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: He denied it, but Robert was in charge of that operation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He denied it, but Robert was in charge of that operation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He denied it, but Robert was in charge of that operation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The day his punishment was determined, he threw his inherited Prydwen on the ground in a fit of anger and left the Institution.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The day his punishment was determined, he threw his inherited Prydwen on the ground in a fit of anger and left the Institution.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The day his punishment was determined, he threw his inherited Prydwen on the ground in a fit of anger and left the Institution.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't help but get furious... when I think of that day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't help but get furious... when I think of that day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't help but get furious... when I think of that day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If his last name wasn't Burnett, I would've ended him with my own two hands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If his last name wasn't Burnett, I would've ended him with my own two hands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If his last name wasn't Burnett, I would've ended him with my own two hands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, your grandfather had to postpone his retirement and work out on the field to make up for this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, your grandfather had to postpone his retirement and work out on the field to make up for this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, your grandfather had to postpone his retirement and work out on the field to make up for this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you feel relieved knowing what happened?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you feel relieved knowing what happened?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you feel relieved knowing what happened?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not at all. I'm a lot more disturbed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not at all. I'm a lot more disturbed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not at all. I'm a lot more disturbed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah hah. That's what the truth will do to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah hah. That's what the truth will do to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah hah. That's what the truth will do to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Still.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Still.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Still.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's better than not knowing anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's better than not knowing anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's better than not knowing anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks for telling me the truth, Morgan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks for telling me the truth, Morgan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks for telling me the truth, Morgan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Institution will continue to need the power of the Burnetts until our goal is achieved.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Institution will continue to need the power of the Burnetts until our goal is achieved.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Institution will continue to need the power of the Burnetts until our goal is achieved.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But your name mustn't define your whole existence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But your name mustn't define your whole existence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But your name mustn't define your whole existence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A gentleman is defined by his actions, after all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A gentleman is defined by his actions, after all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A gentleman is defined by his actions, after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Agent Morgan. Sorry to disturb you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Agent Morgan. Sorry to disturb you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Agent Morgan. Sorry to disturb you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The snowstorm is getting worse, so it looks like you'll have to get to the destination yourselves.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The snowstorm is getting worse, so it looks like you'll have to get to the destination yourselves.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The snowstorm is getting worse, so it looks like you'll have to get to the destination yourselves.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll land on a nearby landing site.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll land on a nearby landing site.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll land on a nearby landing site.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. It was starting to get a bit tedious anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. It was starting to get a bit tedious anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. It was starting to get a bit tedious anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Get your protective suit. You'll lose more than just your hair if you are exposed to snow mixed with Corruption ray.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Get your protective suit. You'll lose more than just your hair if you are exposed to snow mixed with Corruption ray.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Get your protective suit. You'll lose more than just your hair if you are exposed to snow mixed with Corruption ray.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, right. Do you carry any cash with you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, right. Do you carry any cash with you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, right. Do you carry any cash with you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Are you trying to rob me or something? No one carries around cash these days.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Are you trying to rob me or something? No one carries around cash these days.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Are you trying to rob me or something? No one carries around cash these days.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is embarrassing. I forgot to bring offerings to the church.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is embarrassing. I forgot to bring offerings to the church.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is embarrassing. I forgot to bring offerings to the church.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey. That's not what's important. We're not here to make a confession.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey. That's not what's important. We're not here to make a confession.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey. That's not what's important. We're not here to make a confession.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk, tsk. That's why you're still just a kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk, tsk. That's why you're still just a kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk, tsk. That's why you're still just a kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're an agent, so you should know. These kinds of occasions call for formalities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're an agent, so you should know. These kinds of occasions call for formalities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're an agent, so you should know. These kinds of occasions call for formalities.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Even if you don't mean it, it's useful to make a good impression for later on
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Even if you don't mean it, it's useful to make a good impression for later on
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Even if you don't mean it, it's useful to make a good impression for later on
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: According to my memory, you had mentioned how you would make a confession the next time you were to visit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: According to my memory, you had mentioned how you would make a confession the next time you were to visit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: According to my memory, you had mentioned how you would make a confession the next time you were to visit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems like that was merely part of the formalities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems like that was merely part of the formalities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems like that was merely part of the formalities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For your information, you can give offerings via wire transfers nowadays. Thaddeus Morgan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For your information, you can give offerings via wire transfers nowadays. Thaddeus Morgan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For your information, you can give offerings via wire transfers nowadays. Thaddeus Morgan.
